# Summary

## Semver impact

- [ ] **major** (breaking — see [FEATURES.md](./FEATURES.md#versioning-policy))
- [ ] **minor** (additive, non-breaking)
- [ ] **patch** (fix, no API/output change)

If major, confirm: the first commit uses `feat!: ` or has a `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer.

## Changes

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed Conventional Commits
- [ ] I updated/add tests where needed
- [ ] I updated docs where needed
- [ ] I considered Changelog/Release note impact
- [ ] CI status checks (CI, code coverage, Lint) are green
